message:
feat(graph,tui): reuse betweenness scratch buffers and scaffold FlowMatrix view

Eliminate per-source heap allocations in betweenness centrality by
introducing a reusable BetweennessScratch struct; replace VecDeque BFS
with index-based queue. Wire FlowMatrix view mode stubs into list/detail
dispatch, footer, and test constructors. Apply rustfmt reformatting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
